projectDescription: A library of custom Squiz Matrix web components (hh-accordion, hh-banner, hh-blockquote, hh-card) built for the Squiz DXP platform, enabling content editors to add rich, branded UI sections to web pages via the Visual Page Builder.
keyFeatures: HH - Accordion: Collapsible FAQ/content sections with up to 20 items
HH - Banner: Full-width hero banner with video, image, or flat-colour background
HH - Block Quote: Styled pull-quote with optional title and author attribution
HH - Card: Versatile content card with heading, text, optional image and link
Inline editing via Squiz Visual Page Builder (data-sq-field attributes)
Conditional field display (e.g. Banner shows video/image fields only when relevant)
Translatable content fields for multilingual sites
publicApiSurface: hh-banner: mediaType (video|image|none, required), heading (required), videoSource (SquizLink, conditional), image (SquizImage, conditional)
hh-blockquote: quote (FormattedText, required), title (optional), author (optional), favouriteCoffee (optional)
hh-card: heading (required), contentType (optional), supportingText (FormattedText, optional), link (SquizLink, optional), image (SquizImage, optional)
